name: Noble Corp plc
business: Noble Corporation plc is a leading offshore drilling contractor for the oil and gas industry. It provides contract drilling services to the international oil and gas industry with its global fleet of mobile offshore drilling units.
sellsTo: large, integrated, independent, and government-owned or controlled oil and gas companies

exposures.sentence: We provide contract drilling services to the international oil and gas industry with our global fleet of mobile offshore drilling units.
The energy transition from hydrocarbons to renewables poses a challenge to the oil and gas sector and our market.

catalysts.event: Sale of six jackup rigs, with final rig closing expected in Q3 2026
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, Noble entered into agreements to sell six jackup rigs for an aggregate of $424.0 million, comprising $274.0 million in cash and $150.0 million in seller notes that have a six-year maturity. The sale of five rigs closed during the first quarter of 2026 while closing for the final rig is expected in the third quarter of 2026.
